message: 🆘 बेहद जरूरी: एम्स दिल्ली में एक गंभीर एक्सीडेंट केस के लिए तुरंत 3 यूनिट O- ब्लड चाहिए। मरीज ICU में है और बहुत खून बह चुका है। कृपया संपर्क करें 9811122233
message_english: 🆘 Extremely urgent: 3 units of O- blood needed immediately for a severe accident case at AIIMS Delhi. Patient is in ICU and has lost a lot of blood. Please contact 9811122233

message: KEM मुंबई में एक महिला का भारी रक्तस्राव हो रहा है। जान बचाने के लिए 2 यूनिट AB+ खून की तत्काल जरूरत है। जो भी दे सके तुरंत अस्पताल पहुंचे।
message_english: A woman is having heavy bleeding at KEM Mumbai. 2 units of AB+ blood urgently needed to save her life. Whoever can donate please reach the hospital immediately.

message: सफदरजंग अस्पताल में आग से झुलसे मरीज के लिए 4 यूनिट B- ब्लड की इमरजेंसी है। 1 घंटे के अंदर खून चढ़ाना है। कृपया मदद करें 9988776655
message_english: Emergency of 4 units B- blood for a burn victim at Safdarjung hospital. Transfusion needs to be done within 1 hour. Please help 9988776655

message: मैक्स साकेत में हार्ट अटैक के कारण ऑपरेशन थिएटर में मरीज की हालत नाजुक है। 2 यूनिट A+ ब्लड अभी चाहिए।
message_english: Patient condition is critical in the operation theatre due to a heart attack at Max Saket. 2 units A+ blood needed right now.

message: अपोलो चेन्नई में भीषण सड़क दुर्घटना के बाद 5 यूनिट O+ ब्लड की बहुत ज्यादा जरूरत है। कोई डोनर हो तो जल्दी बताएं।
message_english: There is a massive need for 5 units O+ blood after a severe road accident at Apollo Chennai. If there is any donor, please tell quickly.

message: मेदांता में एक नवजात बच्चे की जान खतरे में है। 1 यूनिट AB- ब्लड तुरंत चाहिए। कृपया इस नंबर पर कॉल करें 8888000011
message_english: A newborn baby's life is in danger at Medanta. 1 unit AB- blood needed immediately. Please call this number 8888000011

message: नारायणा बैंगलोर में डेंगू से प्लेटलेट्स बहुत गिर गए हैं। आज शाम तक 2 यूनिट A- ब्लड की आवश्यकता है। कृपया सहयोग करें।
message_english: Platelets have dropped drastically due to dengue at Narayana Bangalore. 2 units A- blood required by this evening. Please cooperate.

message: सर गंगा राम अस्पताल दिल्ली में सर्जरी के दौरान कुछ समस्या आ गई है। 3 यूनिट B+ ब्लड चाहिए। डोनर कृपया संपर्क करें 9000011111
message_english: There has been some complication during surgery at Sir Ganga Ram hospital Delhi. 3 units B+ blood needed. Donors please contact 9000011111

message: लीलावती मुंबई में इंटरनल ब्लीडिंग रोकने के लिए 1 यूनिट O- ब्लड कल सुबह तक चाहिए। मदद के लिए आगे आएं।
message_english: 1 unit O- blood needed by tomorrow morning to stop internal bleeding at Lilavati Mumbai. Please come forward to help.

message: CMC वेल्लोर के ICU में भर्ती मरीज को 2 यूनिट AB+ खून की जरूरत है। आज रात तक व्यवस्था करनी है।
message_english: Patient admitted in ICU at CMC Vellore needs 2 units of AB+ blood. Need to arrange by tonight.

message: KIMS हैदराबाद में लिवर फेल्योर के मरीज को 4 यूनिट O+ ब्लड चाहिए। कृपया ग्रुप में शेयर करें और डोनर खोजें। 9123456780
message_english: Liver failure patient at KIMS Hyderabad needs 4 units O+ blood. Please share in the group and find a donor. 9123456780

message: पीजीआईएमईआर चंडीगढ़ में गंभीर एनीमिया की वजह से मरीज का हीमोग्लोबिन 4 हो गया है। 2 यूनिट A+ ब्लड जल्द से जल्द चाहिए।
message_english: Due to severe anemia at PGIMER Chandigarh, patient's hemoglobin has reached 4. 2 units A+ blood needed as soon as possible.

message: फोर्टिस गुड़गांव में अगले मंगलवार को मेरे पिता का ऑपरेशन है। ब्लड बैंक में 1 यूनिट B- ब्लड जमा करना है। कोई डोनर हो तो बताएं।
message_english: My father's operation is next Tuesday at Fortis Gurgaon. Have to deposit 1 unit B- blood in the blood bank. Let me know if there's any donor.

message: एम्स दिल्ली में रूटीन ट्रांसफ्यूजन के लिए 2 यूनिट A+ ब्लड चाहिए। हमें शुक्रवार तक इंतजाम करना है। कृपया संपर्क करें 9898989898
message_english: 2 units A+ blood needed for routine transfusion at AIIMS Delhi. We need to arrange it by Friday. Please contact 9898989898

message: मेदांता अस्पताल में घुटने बदलने की सर्जरी 3 दिन बाद होनी है। 1 यूनिट O+ ब्लड की आवश्यकता होगी। डोनर मैसेज करें।
message_english: Knee replacement surgery is scheduled after 3 days at Medanta Hospital. 1 unit O+ blood will be needed. Donor please message.

message: KEM मुंबई में अगले हफ्ते मेरी बहन की सिजेरियन डिलीवरी है। डॉक्टर ने 2 यूनिट AB- ब्लड अरेंज करने को कहा है।
message_english: My sister's c-section delivery is next week at KEM Mumbai. Doctor has asked to arrange 2 units AB- blood.

message: रक्तदान शिविर का आयोजन इस रविवार सुबह 9 बजे से दादर, मुंबई में किया जा रहा है। आप सभी से निवेदन है कि आएं और रक्तदान करें।
message_english: A blood donation camp is being organized this Sunday from 9 AM in Dadar, Mumbai. You all are requested to come and donate blood.

message: जिन लोगों ने भी कल दिल्ली में मेरे भाई के लिए रक्तदान किया, उन सभी का बहुत-बहुत धन्यवाद। उसकी सर्जरी सफल रही। 🙏
message_english: A big thank you to everyone who donated blood for my brother yesterday in Delhi. His surgery was successful. 🙏

message: क्या कोई मुझे बता सकता है कि टैटू बनवाने के कितने समय बाद रक्तदान किया जा सकता है? मुझे एक मरीज की मदद करनी है।
message_english: Can anyone tell me how long after getting a tattoo one can donate blood? I need to help a patient.

message: चेन्नई में किसी भी आपातकालीन स्थिति के लिए हमेशा रोटरी ब्लड बैंक से संपर्क करें। यह जानकारी अपने परिवार के साथ साझा करें।
message_english: Always contact Rotary Blood Bank for any emergency situation in Chennai. Share this information with your family.

message: Highway pe bohot bura accident hua hai. Fortis Gurgaon me 4 unit O- URGENTLY chahiye. Please koi jaldi aao 9812345678. Blood bohot beh raha hai 🆘
message_english: There has been a very bad accident on the highway. 4 units of O- URGENTLY needed at Fortis Gurgaon. Someone please come quickly 9812345678. Bleeding heavily 🆘

message: Lilavati Mumbai me patient ICU me sink ho raha hai. 2 unit AB- blood ki immediately requirement hai. Please apne sabhi groups me share karo!!
message_english: Patient is sinking in the ICU at Lilavati Mumbai. 2 units of AB- blood are immediately required. Please share in all your groups!!

message: Sir Ganga Ram Delhi me brain hemorrhage ka case hai. Surgery beech me ruki hai, 3 unit B+ blood abhi ke abhi chahiye. Contact 9990001112
message_english: It is a brain hemorrhage case at Sir Ganga Ram Delhi. Surgery is paused midway, 3 units of B+ blood needed right now. Contact 9990001112

message: AIIMS Delhi trauma center me gunshot wound ka patient laya gaya hai. 2 unit A+ blood chahiye emergency me. Please jo aas paas ho jaldi aaye.
message_english: A gunshot wound patient has been brought to AIIMS Delhi trauma center. 2 units A+ blood needed in emergency. Whoever is nearby, please come quickly.

message: CMC Vellore me patient ka multiple organ failure ho raha hai. 5 unit O+ blood ki immediately zaroorat hai. Zindagi aur maut ka sawal hai 🆘
message_english: Patient is suffering from multiple organ failure at CMC Vellore. 5 units of O+ blood are immediately needed. It's a matter of life and death 🆘

message: KIMS Hyderabad me accident ke baad extreme blood loss hua hai. 3 unit AB+ blood ki ekdum turant zaroorat hai. Pls call 8888000011
message_english: There has been extreme blood loss after an accident at KIMS Hyderabad. 3 units AB+ blood are needed absolutely immediately. Pls call 8888000011

message: Cardiac arrest aaya hai patient ko Apollo Chennai me. 2 unit A- blood chahiye urgently resuscitation ke liye. Please help kijiye guys.
message_english: Patient suffered a cardiac arrest at Apollo Chennai. 2 units A- blood needed urgently for resuscitation. Please help guys.

message: Narayana Bangalore me premature baby ventilator pe hai. 1 unit B- blood ki bohot urgent need hai. Baby ko save karne me help kare.
message_english: Premature baby is on a ventilator at Narayana Bangalore. There is a very urgent need for 1 unit B- blood. Help save the baby.

message: Massive accident on express way! 4 unit O- blood chahiye Safdarjung hospital Delhi me. Pura blood bank khali hai, please RT kare aur donors aaye.
message_english: Massive accident on the expressway! 4 units O- blood needed at Safdarjung hospital Delhi. The whole blood bank is empty, please RT and donors come.

message: Max Saket me severe dengue ke wajah se platelets sirf 15k bache hain. 2 unit B+ blood chahiye by evening. Call me 7777766666
message_english: Due to severe dengue at Max Saket, platelets are left at only 15k. 2 units B+ blood needed by evening. Call me 7777766666

message: Medanta Gurgaon me urgent surgery honi hai kal. 3 unit A+ blood reserve karke rakhna hai hospital me. Kisi ko pata hai koi donor?
message_english: Urgent surgery has to be done tomorrow at Medanta Gurgaon. Need to reserve 3 units A+ blood in the hospital. Anyone knows any donor?

message: KEM Mumbai me acute anemia ka patient admitted hai. 1 unit AB- blood chahiye kal dopehar tak. Blood bohot rare hai, please dhundo.
message_english: Acute anemia patient is admitted at KEM Mumbai. 1 unit AB- blood needed by tomorrow afternoon. Blood is very rare, please search.

message: PGIMER Chandigarh me kidney transplant ke liye 2 unit O+ blood chahiye parso. Donors please contact kare aur help kare is family ki.
message_english: 2 units O+ blood needed for a kidney transplant at PGIMER Chandigarh day after tomorrow. Donors please contact and help this family.

message: GI bleeding rukk nahi rahi hai mere dadaji ki. Fortis Gurgaon me 2 unit B- blood chahiye before night. Pls call 9000088888
message_english: GI bleeding of my grandfather is not stopping. 2 units B- blood needed before night at Fortis Gurgaon. Pls call 9000088888

message: Emergency c-section surgery chalne wali hai Lilavati Mumbai me. 3 unit A- blood chahiye hoga kal subah tak in case of complication.
message_english: Emergency c-section surgery is about to start at Lilavati Mumbai. 3 units A- blood will be needed by tomorrow morning in case of complication.

message: Sir Ganga Ram Delhi me fever ke baad platelets dangerously low ho gaye hain. 1 unit AB+ blood ki zaroorat hai immediately. Please DM.
message_english: Platelets have become dangerously low after fever at Sir Ganga Ram Delhi. 1 unit AB+ blood is needed immediately. Please DM.

message: Leukemia patient ko CMC Vellore me kal chemotherapy deni hai, 2 unit O- blood chahiye hoga. Is number par text kare agar aap donate kar sakte hain: 9123491234
message_english: Leukemia patient has to be given chemotherapy tomorrow at CMC Vellore, 2 units O- blood will be needed. Text on this number if you can donate: 9123491234

message: Bypass surgery ki preparation chal rahi hai Apollo Chennai me. 4 unit B+ blood arrange karna hai kal shaam tak. Kisi ki jaan bach jayegi 🙏
message_english: Bypass surgery preparation is going on at Apollo Chennai. Have to arrange 4 units B+ blood by tomorrow evening. Someone's life will be saved 🙏

message: AIIMS Delhi me dada ji ki planned hip surgery hai Friday ko. Blood bank ne 2 unit O+ deposit karne ko bola hai.
message_english: Grandfather's planned hip surgery is on Friday at AIIMS Delhi. The blood bank has asked to deposit 2 units O+.

message: Routine dialysis ke waqt KIMS Hyderabad me 1 unit A+ blood chahiye hoga next week. Koi bhi healthy donor free ho toh bataye 8000080000
message_english: 1 unit A+ blood will be needed during routine dialysis next week at KIMS Hyderabad. If any healthy donor is free please tell 8000080000

message: Medanta Gurgaon me spinal surgery ke liye 2 unit B- blood arrange karna hai Wednesday ko. Doctor ne bola abhi se donor ready rakho.
message_english: Need to arrange 2 units B- blood for spinal surgery at Medanta Gurgaon on Wednesday. Doctor said to keep the donor ready from now.

message: Max Saket me schedule chemo start honi hai Tuesday ko. 1 unit AB+ blood dena padega hospital me replacement ke liye.
message_english: Scheduled chemo is to start at Max Saket on Tuesday. Will have to give 1 unit AB+ blood in the hospital for replacement.

message: Elective surgery planned hai Narayana Bangalore me is weekend. Blood bank ne 2 unit O- blood secure karne ko bola hai safe side.
message_english: Elective surgery is planned at Narayana Bangalore this weekend. Blood bank has told to secure 2 units O- blood on the safe side.

message: Safdarjung Delhi me thalassemia ki wajah se routine transfusion hai bache ka. 1 unit B+ blood chahiye Thursday tak. Please help kar do. 9811198111
message_english: Routine transfusion for a child due to thalassemia at Safdarjung Delhi. 1 unit B+ blood needed by Thursday. Please help. 9811198111

message: Rotary club ke taraf se is Sunday Delhi me bada blood donation camp lagaya gaya hai. Sabhi society members zarur aayein.
message_english: A big blood donation camp has been organized in Delhi this Sunday by the Rotary club. All society members must definitely come.

message: Mumbai me jisne bhi mere dad ke liye blood donate kiya tha, a massive THANK YOU from our family. He is recovering very well now 😊
message_english: Whoever donated blood for my dad in Mumbai, a massive THANK YOU from our family. He is recovering very well now 😊

message: Bhai log koi bata sakta hai ki agar kisi ko covid hua tha toh woh kitne mahine baad blood donate kar sakta hai Pune me?
message_english: Brothers can anyone tell how many months after someone had covid can they donate blood in Pune?

message: Hyderabad IT hub me mega donor registration drive start ho rahi hai from tomorrow. Let's make a difference together and register.
message_english: Mega donor registration drive is starting from tomorrow in Hyderabad IT hub. Let's make a difference together and register.

message: Chandigarh PGIMER ke blood bank ki timings kya hai weekend pe? Kisi ko pakka info pata hai kya?
message_english: What are the timings of Chandigarh PGIMER blood bank on the weekend? Does anyone know the sure info?

message: Blood donate karne se koi weakness nahi aati, bas 15 minute ka time lagta hai. Kolkata walo, nikal kar donate karo!
message_english: There is no weakness from donating blood, it just takes 15 minutes of time. Kolkata people, come out and donate!
